schemas.name: Virtual Auditor
schemas.description: AI-powered CA and IBBI Registered Valuer firm offering IBBI-compliant valuations (ESOP, FEMA, Income Tax, Companies Act, SEBI, IBC, 409A, complex instruments, AIF), FEMA compliance, GST and income tax appeals, forensic accounting, company registration, and secretarial services across India.

address.streetAddress: G-131, Ground Floor, Phase 3, Spencer Plaza Mall, Anna Salai
Workafella, AK Estate, SV Road, off Veer Savarkar Flyover, Goregaon West

schemas.name: Business Advisory — M&A & Restructuring
schemas.description: Business advisory by CA firm. Strategic financial consulting, fundraising support, M&A advisory, business restructuring, exit planning. Virtual Auditor.

schemas.name: Business Advisory Services
schemas.description: Business advisory by CA firm. Strategic financial consulting, fundraising support, M&A advisory, business restructuring, exit planning. Virtual Auditor.

schemas.name: Business Advisory Services
schemas.description: Business advisory by CA firm. Strategic financial consulting, fundraising support, M&A advisory, business restructuring, exit planning. Virtual Auditor.

mainEntity.name: How is business advisory different from Virtual CFO?

acceptedAnswer.text: Virtual CFO handles ongoing financial management (MIS, cash flow, compliance). Business advisory addresses specific strategic decisions — fundraising, M&A, restructuring, exit. Different scope, different engagement model.
We prepare the financial foundation (model, valuation, data room, compliance check) and advise on deal structure. We do not broker investor introductions — we make you investor-ready.

mainEntity.name: What business advisory services do you offer?

acceptedAnswer.text: M&A advisory (buy-side and sell-side), business restructuring, capital structure optimisation, working capital management, exit planning, succession planning, and regulatory strategy for multi-jurisdictional operations.

mainEntity.name: How do you help with M&A transactions?

acceptedAnswer.text: Target identification, preliminary valuation, due diligence management, deal structuring (share purchase vs asset purchase vs slump sale), tax planning, regulatory approvals, and post-merger integration advisory.

mainEntity.name: What is the cost of business advisory?

acceptedAnswer.text: Project-based: ₹1,00,000-₹5,00,000 depending on complexity. M&A advisory: success fee (1-3% of transaction value) plus retainer. Monthly retainer for ongoing advisory: ₹25,000-₹75,000.

mainEntity.name: Do you help with business restructuring?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Demerger, merger, slump sale, capital reduction, and scheme of arrangement under Section 230-232 of Companies Act. Tax-efficient structuring, NCLT applications, and regulatory compliance (RBI, SEBI, CCI as applicable).

mainEntity.name: Can you advise on cross-border transactions?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. FEMA compliance for inbound/outbound transactions, transfer pricing, withholding tax, DTAA benefits, and multi-regulatory coordination. Our FEMA + Tax + Companies Act expertise handles the intersection that most firms miss.
